raw.prompt: Customer: The charger failed after one week.
raw.chosen: I am sorry for the issue. Please provide your order number and a short video so we can arrange after-sales support.
raw.rejected: I am sorry for the issue. Please provide your order number and a short video so we can arrange after-sales support.

errors: chosen/rejected: chosen and rejected must differ
